title: Bringing Up Father
writer: Frances Marion, George McManus, Ralph Spence
actors: Marie Dressler, Polly Moran, J. Farrell MacDonald
plot: The wealthy Jiggs is tired of being left out of the swanky parties thrown by his social-climbing wife Maggie and their daughter. He decides to teach them a "lesson" by faking his own suicide, but things don't quite turn out the wa...
